title: eriophorum opacum
intro: Eriophorum opacum, also known as the cotton grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family and is native to northern Europe and Asia. The plant's medicinal properties include its ability to reduce inflammation and its antimicrobial properties, which can aid in the treatment of wounds and skin infections. The health benefits of eriophorum opacum include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of cotton grass include tea, tincture, and salve, which can be used to treat various health issues, including skin conditions, respiratory problems, and digestive issues.
